steps.content: Starting within Random Forest, the only family I will use this session: 100 trees, depth 5.
Mean cross-validated accuracy 0.9623 with a low standard deviation of 0.0113, indicating a stable estimate.
Refining immediately near the first result: more trees, unlimited depth.
Mean drops to 0.9598 and standard deviation rises to 0.0148, so both the mean and stability got worse; experiment 1 remains best.
Third and final experiment of the fixed budget: try a moderate depth of 7 with 200 trees, still refining near the original best.
Same mean and standard deviation as experiment 2, still below experiment 1.

steps.final_recommendation: random_forest, n_estimators=100, max_depth=5 (cv_mean=0.9623, std=0.0113) - best mean AND lowest std of the three, budget of 3 experiments exhausted.
